signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed, Even Serving as Chair Pro Tem if Needed** | **NO** |
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed, Even Serving as Chair Pro Tem if Needed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

Powell made this statement on March 18 during a press conference after a Fed meeting, clarifying he will stay beyond his May term end if no successor (noted as Kevin Warsh nominee) is Senate-confirmed, per legal precedent[1][2]. No new confirmations
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
